calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-341 retune 6-arm validation (manifest-recovery re-run of V3-EXQ-611b)
items.note: V3-EXQ-611b ran on DLAPTOP-4.local 2026-05-28T17:26:42Z -> 18:14:45Z; runner cache reports PASS (C1=True C2=False C3=True R2c=True, 18/18). Result manifest missing from REE_assembly/evidence/experiments/, absent from coordinator DB results, sentinel _runner_signals/V3-EXQ-611b.json missing. Canonical heartbeat-autostash-silent-revert pattern (DLAPTOP-4 coordination_mode=shadow at the time). 611c is a bit-identical re-run on the same MECH-341 retune substrate to recover the manifest. Plan-of-record: REE_assembly/evidence/planning/behavioral_diversity_isolation_plan.md GAP-B (NEXT step (2) is gated on this manifest landing). experiment_purpose=diagnostic.

items.title: GAP-B P3 behavioural falsifier: B_only / ablate_B / ALL_ON (MECH-341 R2.c)
items.note: Phase P3 behavioural falsifier per behavioral_diversity_isolation_plan.md GAP-B NEXT step (2). 3 arms isolating the 4-substrate stack on SD-054 bipartite reef env (same env as V3-EXQ-611/611b/611c): ARM_0_B_only (only MECH-341 ON), ARM_1_ablate_B (A+C+D ON, B OFF), ARM_2_ALL_ON (all four). V_s scope = minimal (use_per_stream_vs + use_vs_rollout_gating; no anchor sets / staleness / event segmenter / invalidation trigger). MECH-341 sub-flavours: both ON at entropy_bias_scale=2.0 (611b retune sweep target). MECH-313: alpha=0.1 (V3-EXQ-544 PASS default). V_s gate: 0.5 snapshot refresh / 0.4 e1 threshold (V3-EXQ-601 PASS defaults). 3 seeds, P0=30 + P1=60, 200 steps/ep. Acceptance: C1 (R2.c -- B_only majority rung1 PASS) OR (C2 (ALL_ON entropy - ablate_B entropy >= 0.1) AND C3 (ALL_ON majority rung1 PASS)). experiment_purpose=evidence. Multi-claim direction reads off interpretation grid (4 rows). Priority 305 sits below V3-EXQ-611c (310) so 611c runs first; same DLAPTOP-4.local affinity. Cross-link: arc_062_rule_apprehension:GAP-B (V3-EXQ-543l successor cohort). Dry-run smoke: 3/3 arms x 1 seed x P0=2/P1=2/30 steps complete, all verdict lines emitted, multi-claim direction logic verified, validate_experiments.py PASS, validate_queue.py PASS.

A_only design -- MECH-341 (Layer B) OFF, MECH-313 (Layer C) OFF. Plan-of-record: REE_assembly/evidence/planning/behavioral_diversity_isolation_plan.md GAP-A node.

items.title: INV-074 crystallization necessity test (re-queue of V3-EXQ-610 with corrected runtime estimate)
items.note: Re-queue of V3-EXQ-610 (ran 2026-05-27T18:05:04Z on DLAPTOP-4.local, runner-classified ERROR via exit code -15 SIGTERM after actual_secs=47729.4 / 13.25h vs 180min estimate; no on-disk manifest, no code crash). Predecessor ran ARM_0_control to completion across all 3 seeds (verified ep 2500/2500 phase=3 log lines), then started ARM_1_test seed=42 and reached ep 2100/2500 phase=3 before SIGTERM. Script byte-identical to predecessor except EXPERIMENT_TYPE/QUEUE_ID/SUPERSEDES updated and stdout tags refreshed to [V3-EXQ-610a]; manifest now carries supersedes='V3-EXQ-610' so governance can mark the predecessor manifest superseded (no predecessor manifest exists; supersession is for queue-side traceability). estimated_minutes=800 (~13.5h) calibrated to predecessor actual_secs. Per IGW-20260529-030. Smoke 2026-05-29T06:25Z PASS (5 eps/arm/seed, ARM_0 + ARM_1 wiring intact, verdict line emitted). Substrate dependency MECH-341 landed 2026-05-27 commit 547faa3.

items.title: Phase 3 E2E smoke (verdict sentinel fix retry)
